headline: FPT Expands Strategic Collaboration with Microsoft to Advance AI Frontier Innovation Across Asia
summary: HANOI, Vietnam, June 25, 2026--FPT Corporation today announced an expanded strategic collaboration with Microsoft aimed at accelerating enterprise AI adoption and co‑innovation across Asia, with a strong focus on ASEAN, Japan, and South Korea. The collaboration brings together Microsoft’s global AI platforms with FPT’s large‑scale delivery and regional market capabilities to support organizations as they move from AI experimentation to real‑world, scalable impact, with measurable business outcom

content.title: FPT Expands Strategic Collaboration with Microsoft to Advance AI Frontier Innovation Across Asia
content.summary: HANOI, Vietnam, June 25, 2026--FPT Corporation today announced an expanded strategic collaboration with Microsoft aimed at accelerating enterprise AI adoption and co‑innovation across Asia, with a strong focus on ASEAN, Japan, and South Korea. The collaboration brings together Microsoft’s global AI platforms with FPT’s large‑scale delivery and regional market capabilities to support organizations as they move from AI experimentation to real‑world, scalable impact, with measurable business outcom

thumbnail.caption: Representatives of FPT and Microsoft at the signing ceremony, formalizing an expanded strategic collaboration to advance AI Frontier innovation across Asia
